title: Help
subtitle: Tips on how to use the app
intro: Below are practical tips on how to use the app's main screens.

home.title: Home & Overview
home.content:
The Overview on the home screen shows your business's current net worth: the money in your accounts, plus what you are owed, minus what you owe.
Accounts, contacts or staff you set to passive are excluded from the Overview; by making items passive you can track them without affecting this report. This lets you monitor a sale or purchase without reflecting it in the Overview or income-expense.
Use the + button at the bottom right to quickly add income, expense, a transfer or a client/staff transaction.
With "Enter Daily Revenue" you can record end-of-day account entries in bulk from a single screen.

hesaplar.title: Accounts (Bank, Cash, Credit Card)
hesaplar.content:
Recording every bank, cash and credit card transaction here manually helps you get the most out of the app.
When you create income or expense from an account, both an income-expense record is created and a cash inflow/outflow is applied to that account.
You can create as many separate cash boxes/accounts as you like for different branches.
Enter POS device and bank commission expenses into a separate "bank commission" category; this way you also track the "hidden expenses" in a business and build financial discipline.

birikim.title: Savings Accounts
birikim.content:
You can open savings accounts in any currency.
If you convert your monthly profit into dollars, euros or gold and keep it separately, you can track it with a savings account.
Open a separate savings account for each currency: a gold account for gold, a dollar account for dollars, a euro account for euros.

cariler.title: Contacts (Customers & Suppliers)
cariler.content:
Be sure to record suppliers and customers you work with on credit (term) as contacts; only this way can you track how much you are owed and how much you owe.
If you work on a cash basis, you can create income/expense directly from accounts; but then you won't have a separate report for that supplier or customer.
To see how much you buy from a supplier or sell to a customer, it makes sense to create a contact: enter the sale first, then the collection right after. This way you can see your total buy-sell volume even months later.
Use the chart icon on the contact detail for that contact's report and the share icon for its statement; with the share code you can share a contact with another business.

personel.title: Staff
personel.content:
Before paying staff, follow the order: first create a "staff expense", then enter the payment.
A staff expense represents the employee's entitlement (accrual); salary, overtime or bonus accrues this way.
When you pay the salary, overtime or bonus, use the "payment" option; this closes the staff balance correctly.
Use the bulk salary/payment screen to process several staff at once; track remaining leave with leave entitlement and usage.

urunler.title: Products & Stock
urunler.content:
You don't have to use the Products section only for stock tracking.
You can also use it to track how much of a product or service you buy and sell, and how its price changes over the months.
Update quantity with stock in/out; use adjustment to set stock directly to a desired value; process many products at once with the bulk screen.
If you link a product transaction to a contact, both stock and the contact balance are updated together.

kategoriler.title: Categories
kategoriler.content:
Categories come ready-made (preset), but you can add or remove them as you wish.
In reports you see how much you spent on a category or how much income you earned from it.
For more detailed tracking, create sub-categories: for example, under a supplier category you can create as many sub-categories as you like, such as packaging, meat products, poultry products, cleaning and consumables.
Adding a category to every transaction is important; otherwise you can't get full value from the reports.
Products have their own categories. If you link product categories to income/expense categories, they also appear in income-expense reports; if you don't, they only affect product and contact movements.

islemler.title: Transactions
islemler.content:
When adding a transaction, choose its type: income, expense, transfer between accounts, or a client/staff transaction.
By adding products to a transaction you can create the stock movement at the same time.
You can attach a receipt/invoice photo to a transaction.
You can search and filter from the All Transactions screen.

ileri.title: Scheduled Transactions
ileri.content:
If you have collections, payments, purchases or sales that will be finalized in the future (for example cheques/promissory notes or term transactions), enter them as "scheduled".
This way you see upcoming transactions in advance and get a reminder when they are due.

raporlar.title: Reports
raporlar.content:
From Reports, access income-expense, category, account-based and net worth trend reports.
Use the period selector at the top to choose yearly, monthly, weekly, daily or a custom date range.
You can export reports and statements as Excel and PDF and share them.

mutabakat.title: Reconciliation
mutabakat.content:
With Reconciliation you can compare your records for a contact against the Excel/CSV statement they send you.
The app detects missing or extra entries; you can add the missing ones with a single tap.

paylasim.title: Sharing & Multi-User
paylasim.content:
You can share your business with your partners or teammates so everyone can enter transactions; both sides see who entered which transaction.
Who deleted or edited which transaction can also be seen from the transaction history.
Create an invite code and assign a manager, operator or custom role; each role has different permissions and cannot see disabled modules.
You can share a specific contact with another business and remove sharing at any time.

disaAktarma.title: Export, Backup & Security
disaAktarma.content:
You can share or print account summaries and balance statements as PDF or Excel for any date range you choose.
Use Import Data in the More menu to bulk-import transactions from an Excel file.
Your data is backed up on our servers and does not get lost; all revenue, income and expenses you enter are stored encrypted and cannot be seen by others. In short, your data is kept safely and with backups.

tips.title: Handy Tips
tips.content:
Swipe list items left or right to quickly edit or delete them.
Instead of deleting an account, contact or staff you no longer use, archive it; your past reports are preserved.
You can change your currency and language preferences from the More menu.
